latin: Praefectus sclopetum maximum ad latronem iacentem direxit. 'sextum telum emisi an quintum? verum dicam, ipse nescio. sed hoc sclopetum potentissimum in orbe est. ergo quaero: te fortunatum sentis, improbe?'

questions.prompt: What is the officer's dilemma for the criminal?
questions.target: Whether the gun still has a bullet left
choices: Whether to arrest or release him
Whether the gun still has a bullet left

questions.prompt: What question does he ask the criminal?

translation: The officer aimed the largest gun at the criminal lying on the ground. 'Did I fire six shots or five? To tell the truth, I don't know myself. But this is the most powerful gun in the world. So I ask: do you feel lucky, punk?'
